programme.title: E4 - Winter
programme.desc: Winter is the ultimate challenge for wildlife across America. Will they escape to milder southern climates or stay put and tough out the season? See how different creatures respond to the brutal cold and blizzards that blanket the North.

programme.title: E4 - Algoa Bay: Last Refuge of the African Penguin
programme.desc: The population of African penguins in Southern Africa is on the decline, but the charismatic species has found a stronghold on two islands in Algoa Bay. This is the story of the penguins’ daily struggle to raise families in an unforgiving and hostile environment.

programme.title: E3 - Growing Pains
programme.desc: Experience a roller coaster of emotions and growing pains as the sanctuary’s orangutans move through six grades toward their release into the wild. Discover how Dilla’s fate suddenly changes, and watch as big boy Beni goes on an unwelcome diet.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E5 - Fight Club
programme.desc: Step into the ring with nature’s top brawlers, who use violence to get what they need. Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas, and catch an epic neck-whipping giraffe battle.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E4 - Winter
programme.desc: Winter is the ultimate challenge for wildlife across America. Will they escape to milder southern climates or stay put and tough out the season? See how different creatures respond to the brutal cold and blizzards that blanket the North.

programme.title: E4 - Algoa Bay: Last Refuge of the African Penguin
programme.desc: The population of African penguins in Southern Africa is on the decline, but the charismatic species has found a stronghold on two islands in Algoa Bay. This is the story of the penguins’ daily struggle to raise families in an unforgiving and hostile environment.

programme.title: E3 - Growing Pains
programme.desc: Experience a roller coaster of emotions and growing pains as the sanctuary’s orangutans move through six grades toward their release into the wild. Discover how Dilla’s fate suddenly changes, and watch as big boy Beni goes on an unwelcome diet.

programme.title: E5 - Fight Club
programme.desc: Step into the ring with nature’s top brawlers, who use violence to get what they need. Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas, and catch an epic neck-whipping giraffe battle.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E1 - Memoirs of Acacia
programme.desc: Across rippled dunes, in the wind-swept grasslands of the southern Kalahari towers a magnificent Camelthorn. It has stood here for two centuries. This tree is never lonely, learn how it provides food, shelter and a hunting ground to many creatures.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E5 - Fight Club
programme.desc: Step into the ring with nature’s top brawlers, who use violence to get what they need. Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas, and catch an epic neck-whipping giraffe battle.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E4 - Operation Rhino
programme.desc: Across Africa 97% of black rhinos have been killed for their horns. In 1997 the species was declared officially extinct in Zambia. But now, thanks to an ambitious reintroduction plan, they’re back. Poaching hasn’t gone away – their horns are still prized in Asian medicine. But a small, dedicated team are fighting to keep them safe. This is the frontline of conservation – it doesn’t get any tougher.

programme.title: E4 - Winter
programme.desc: Winter is the ultimate challenge for wildlife across America. Will they escape to milder southern climates or stay put and tough out the season? See how different creatures respond to the brutal cold and blizzards that blanket the North.

programme.title: E3 - Spud, Digger, and Tommy
programme.desc: Explore Tasmanian devils’ softer side, meet a pioneering sea turtle, and enjoy family dinner with Buttons the deer. Play football with 800-kilogram Spud the bull and learn how Digger the owl soothed conservationist Nigel during his cancer treatment.

programme.title: E1 - Sirga, Loki and Hugger
programme.desc: Walk on the wild side with Sirga the lion, whose human pal, Val, has been by her side since she was an orphaned cub. See Loki the raven entertain his BFF Elliott, cuddle with Hugger the stingray, and see why Trish and Garri the koala are like family.

programme.title: E3 - Meerkat Survival School
programme.desc: Learn how to disarm and dine on scorpions with meerkat pups in the Kalahari Desert and review a lioness’ flirting strategy in Kenya. Meet same-sex penguin couples who are raising chicks together, then sign up for an Asian elephant babysitters’ club.

programme.title: E1 - The Maldives
programme.desc: Raed Hammoud travels to the heart of the Indian Ocean, to a tiny island in the Maldives. In this paradisiacal archipelago, where cricket fans are numerous, he visits the Mahibadhoo stadium, renamed the Pele Stadium. It's a chance to meet supporters who are passionate about football.

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !:2025-2026
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite:2026
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf:2025-2026
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: L'actu:2025-2026

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !:2025-2026
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite:2026
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: E41 - Watch
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: E3 - The Maze
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: E48 - Who Is Going To Look After The Triplets?
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: E8 - Jerome Ake Beda (Ivory Coast)
programme.desc: Elected best sommelier in Switzerland in 2015, Jerome is the ambassador of Chasselas in the canton of Vaud. Yet he was born far from the vineyards, in Ivory Coast, where he first trained in hospitality. Now settled in the heart of the Leman vineyards, he makes wine a language blending memory and culture.

programme.title: E12 - Laura Huang Li (Paris)/Adeline Rappaz (Paris)
programme.desc: They challenge artistic codes and embody a living, bold and committed art. Richard Orlinski meets Laura Huang Li, a designer with Franco-Chinese influences, who reinvents floral art with a minimalist approach inspired by ikebana. Together, they create a sculpture combining anemones, poppies and hydrangeas, a subtle blend of rigor and spontaneity. Adeline Rappaz is a Swiss high-end ready-to-wear designer, drawing inspiration from urbex, the living and the ephemeral. Her work combines ethics and innovation, through the enhancement of dormant stocks from major French fashion houses, for unique collections.

programme.title: E5 - Ken Belanger, Mountain Guide In Japan
programme.desc: Ken Belanger is a mountain guide and off-piste skiing specialist on Hokkaido, Japan's most northerly island. He welcomes five skiers who have come to live an extraordinary experience in this powder snow paradise. The group climb Mount Asahi, the island's highest peak.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: What intimate and social relationship do Black French-speaking people have with their skin color? Through personal testimonies, expert contributions and innovative visual staging, the series explores the historical and cultural evolution of the representation of Black skin.

programme.title: E11 - Mathias Bensimon/Haider Ackermann/Salome Cousseau
programme.desc: Off to Montreal to discover the Musee des Beaux-Arts. Guided by meditation, Mathias Bensimon creates profound and luminous canvases. Haider Ackermann expresses the sensuality and eroticism so dear to Tom Ford, while adding a touch of poetry and gentleness. Sculptor Salome Cousseau shapes wood with passion and elegance.

programme.title: E308 - The Crew Builds A Giant Duck Plane / The Crew Builds A Vet Room For Motor
programme.desc: A flock of migrating ducks settles in Builder Cove! It's up to Rubble & Crew to help the ducks start moving south. // Motor doesn't want to visit Dr. Diwa at the Vet Clinic... so the pups build a special space just for her!

programme.title: E103 - Magic
programme.desc: Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine.

programme.title: E818 - The Petting Farm
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit Mrs Badger's petting farm where they meet lots of little animals and learn it's important to wash your hands.

programme.title: E103 - Magic
programme.desc: Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine.

programme.title: E526 - Pups Save Ace's Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Rocky and the Pups are fixing an Old-Timey Junk Car for Ace Sorensen's Birthday!

programme.title: E124 - Barbazoo Can't Say ''no'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: E201 - Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the 'BAM'.

programme.title: E202 - Princess For A Day / Barbabeau's Adventure
programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: E301 - The Crew Builds A Vet Clinic / The Crew Builds A Mermaid Party
programme.desc: When the traveling veterinarian Dr. Diwa can't finish all her checkups in Builder Cove in time, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Lily's mermaid-themed birthday party is called off when it starts to rain. Time for a construction solution!

programme.title: E302 - The Crew Builds A Hotel Elevator / The Crew Builds A Popcorn-Cat Cafe
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew steps in to help at Hotel Hadley after a snowy surprise. But when the stairs aren't fast enough, it's time to bow wow build! // Cafe Carl adopted kittens! But when they cause popcorn pandemonium, Rubble & Crew make the cafe cat-friendly

programme.title: E310 - The Crew Builds A Skyscraper
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are building their biggest construction project ever... a skyscraper! And a job that huge calls for brand-new, mega-sized construction vehicles! But when Speed Meister sees the pups' big trucks, he calls in help from his big brother.

programme.title: E315 - Inventor's Block / A Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Kai has inventor's block during the annual inventor's competition! Scratch's invention malfunctions and creates a chaotic weather. // Sir Steel loves boba tea but he damages Professor Scratch's boba-making machine and floods the streets with pearls.

programme.title: E720 - Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle and the playgroup are sharing their best nursery rhymes with each other.

programme.title: E721 - Digger World
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig, Peppa and George have a wonderful day with Mr. Potato at Digger World!

programme.title: E722 - Dolls Hospital
programme.desc: When Peppa gets Teddy dirty jumping in muddy puddles, she goes to The Doll Hospital.

programme.title: E102 - Birthday Party / Tick Tock Mr. Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile wants to be a good guest at Daisy's birthday party since he's never been to one before. // Rushing to get to a concert on time, Mr. Crocodile and Daisy misplace their tickets at Mom's Box and Ship Shop.

programme.title: E712 - The Pillow Pirate
programme.desc: When a burgling buccaneer steals every pillow in Axle City, it's up to Special Mission Blaze to save bedtime! Using his new Special Mission Modes and the power of addition, can Blaze solve this pillow problem?

programme.title: E310 - The Crew Builds A Skyscraper
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are building their biggest construction project ever... a skyscraper! And a job that huge calls for brand-new, mega-sized construction vehicles! But when Speed Meister sees the pups' big trucks, he calls in help from his big brother.

programme.title: E824 - Bat And Ball
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle teaches the children how to play Bat and Ball. She teaches them so well that they win the game!

programme.title: E818 - The Petting Farm
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit Mrs Badger's petting farm where they meet lots of little animals and learn it's important to wash your hands.

programme.title: E308 - The Crew Builds A Giant Duck Plane / The Crew Builds A Vet Room For Motor
programme.desc: A flock of migrating ducks settles in Builder Cove! It's up to Rubble & Crew to help the ducks start moving south. // Motor doesn't want to visit Dr. Diwa at the Vet Clinic... so the pups build a special space just for her!

programme.desc: Madame Gazelle teaches the children how to play Bat and Ball. She teaches them so well that they win the game!

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E46
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: Premier League Review of the Season 2025/26
NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: New Zealand tour of England, 2026 -LIVE: ENG vs NZ, 1st Test, Day 2[Live]

E25 - Dr. Catastrophe
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: E25 - Taxi
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: E11 - Mountain Mints
programme.desc: Scarf Lady takes Sarah and Duck on trip up the mountains.

programme.title: E22 - I Like Jellyfish, Because They Jiggle
programme.desc: The funny little animals talk us through all their favourite creatures.

programme.title: E32 - It's Time For A Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran join Jaxon and Ezra in the park for Cynthia's pirate-themed treasure hunt. Who will be the first to find the treasure? Come on, shipmates, and set sail with JoJo and Gran Gran!

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E28 - Stories
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: E26 - The Puddle Badge
programme.desc: Happy sets his sights on a questionable looking puddle that he is determined to splash in!

programme.title: E21 - Pak Choi
programme.desc: Pak Choi, who might be known by many names, sings about how she's 'Always Pak To You!'

programme.title: E25 - Aargh! Jelly!
programme.desc: Broccoli shows Supertato her latest art exhibition of jelly sculptures, but jelly is Supertato's secret fear. When Evil Pea finds out, she comes up with an evil idea to beat him.

programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: E20 - The Midnight Badge
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: E2 - The Face Painting Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E17 - Copy The King
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: E105 - Songtime
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po enjoy Tiddlytubbies Songtime. Then it is time for Teletubbies Songtime. The Teletubbies sing solo before singing all together.

programme.title: E11 - Grudge Match
programme.desc: Raul, the Brazilian tank engine, wants to beat Thomas in a game. But Raul's super-competitive nature soon gets him into trouble.

programme.title: E37 - Kinderdijk, Netherlands
programme.desc: The Go Jetters travel to Kinderdijk in The Netherlands to celebrate National Mill Day.

programme.title: E39 - Wimbledon, England
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are at Centre Court in Wimbledon to watch the world's most famous tennis tournament.

programme.title: E12 - Be Brave Bryan
programme.desc: Bryan gets spooked and thinks there's a lake monster lurking in the mists. It'll be Mojo and Bo who have to find the monster... or show Bryan that there's no monster at all!

programme.title: E58 - Cheese Arancini In Saint Germain Du Salembre
programme.desc: Heading to Saint Germain du Salembre, in the Perigord Blanc. There lies one of the last artisanal biscuit factories in France. Alessandra Montagne meets Sylvain, the owner. On today's menu: arancini made with Trappe d'Echourgnac, the oldest cheese in Perigord.

programme.title: E85 - Wearing A Very Short Hem
programme.desc: Fashion, craftwork, design, beauty, cuisine, lifestyle... a round-up of the best moments from ''Tendance XXI''!

programme.title: E2 - Under Her Wing
programme.desc: Step into the fascinating world of barn owls with world-renowned biologist Alexandre Roulin.

programme.title: E21 - Terrasses Et Jardins/Wedding Dress/Beauville/Scarf
programme.desc: Terrasses et Jardins can transform any space, indoors or out, into a bespoke haven of greenery. Find out all about the origins of the wedding dress. In Alsace, Beauville enhances the art of the table with top-of-the-range household linen. The right way to wear a scarf.

programme.title: E85 - Wearing A Very Short Hem
programme.desc: Fashion, craftwork, design, beauty, cuisine, lifestyle... a round-up of the best moments from ''Tendance XXI''!

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: To honor journalist and actress Janette Bertrand's 100th birthday and her contribution to Quebec culinary culture, the brigade prepares one of her favorite desserts.

programme.title: E19 - Aquitaine, From Farm To Farm
programme.desc: With its 85,000 farms spread across 84,000 km2, Nouvelle-Aquitaine stands out as an undeniable European agricultural leader. From cereal plains to renowned vineyards and the largest cattle and goat farms in France, the region offers an agricultural landscape of exceptional richness.

programme.title: E3 - Pelleas And Melisande
programme.desc: Created in 1902 to a libretto by Maurice Maeterlinck, Claude Debussy's only opera ''Pelleas and Melisande'' is composed as a long conversation. Extracts from the 2020 performance of this tragic opera given at the Bordeaux Opera House.

programme.title: E28 - A. Pirates/I See You
programme.desc: When Aqualad and Raven fall for each other, Beast Boy fights this match - with intensity.

programme.title: E436 - Illuminated Lemmings/Hide-N-Seek Lemmings/Nocturnal Din/A Love For Fridges/Bear Famil
programme.desc: The Lemmings are throwing a big birthday party but Grizzy tries to crash it due to his sensible eyes.

programme.title: E119 - The Expert/Portrait Of A Captain
programme.desc: Jim brings Bianca, the 'human expert,' on a mission to collect onions. But when they meet a girl in the onion garden, Jim realizes Bianca might not be the expert she claims to be…

programme.title: E115 - The Gut/The Wrinkle
programme.desc: When Anais enlists her dad’s help with her science project, Richard’s GUT becomes its own brilliant thinking entity, separate from the original Richard we all know, and Anais must choose between the two.

programme.title: E37 - Grounded/Internet Troll
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa must fix his mistake after he helps a grounded teen go to a party.

programme.title: E107 - Mindless Beasts
programme.desc: Lloyd encounters a new elemental master while Sora is forced to choose between her past and Ninjago’s future.

programme.title: E156 - The Parents/The Founder/The Schooling/The Intelligence/The Potion
programme.desc: After accidentally bumping into each other in the grocery aisle, Nicole and her parents have it out. The Wattersons discover why Nicole and her parents haven't been on speaking terms for so long. The kids decide to bring about a reunion, in order to secure that backlog of birthday and holiday presents...

programme.title: E119 - The Expert/Portrait Of A Captain
programme.desc: Jim brings Bianca, the 'human expert,' on a mission to collect onions. But when they meet a girl in the onion garden, Jim realizes Bianca might not be the expert she claims to be…

programme.title: E37 - Shiro Becomes A Ninja/The Secret Of The Super Hero Badge/An Ant's Life/Sunday Golf
programme.desc: Shiro must sneak into a castle in Kasukabe Ninja Town where a secret book in the shape of a bone is hidden in, and it may be the Bobobobobone.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E120 - Shrimad Ramayan
programme.desc: An epic tale that explores the eternal battle between good and evil, highlighting the quest for righteousness and spiritual awakening

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E6 - Twinkle's Calming Sounds
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: Join Bubbles for a day of magic, a blob, a show & a bubble! First, Bubbles is excited to watch Pogo's magic show, but her curiosity gets the better of her & she spoils his tricks! Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E7 - Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Get ready to move and score with JJ and friends! Join a huge family soccer match, then test your speed with the 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes' dance. Afterward, hit the beach for a fun game of Freeze Dance and celebrate your victory!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E3 - Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Join Blippi on an adventure to the wonders of our world & beyond! First, he travels to the tallest mountain on Earth, Mt. Everest, with his new friend Betty the Yeti. Then, he dives deep into the ocean to explore a kelp forest with Jerry the Jellyfish. The adventure gets explosive as Blippi & FETCH fly into a volcano! After exploring the Earth, Blippi blasts off into space to tour the solar system, learn about gravity on the moon & discover how rainbows get their amazing colors!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E5 - Super Creative Day of Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E4 - Nina’s Football Dream!
programme.desc: Join Nina as she imagines being a soccer superstar in the World Cup! Help her race against friends, lead her family in a fun-filled day of soccer and games, and learn to drive a tractor on Grandpa's farm. With Nina, every day is an adventure!

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.desc: Get ready to move and score with JJ and friends! Join a huge family soccer match, then test your speed with the 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes' dance. Afterward, hit the beach for a fun game of Freeze Dance and celebrate your victory!

programme.title: E4 - Nina’s Football Dream!
programme.desc: Join Nina as she imagines being a soccer superstar in the World Cup! Help her race against friends, lead her family in a fun-filled day of soccer and games, and learn to drive a tractor on Grandpa's farm. With Nina, every day is an adventure!

programme.title: E4 - Nina’s Football Dream!
programme.desc: Join Nina as she imagines being a soccer superstar in the World Cup! Help her race against friends, lead her family in a fun-filled day of soccer and games, and learn to drive a tractor on Grandpa's farm. With Nina, every day is an adventure!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: Cuba On The Brink: The End Of A Revolution?
programme.desc: Cuba is back on Washington's radar. With pressure mounting under Trump, is this the beginning of the end for the communist regime? Our guests: Burkhard Birke (freelance Journalist); Rosa Munoz Lima (DW); Bernd Pickert (taz)

programme.title: The Future Of Travel: Apps, Ai, Robots - And The Loss Of Adventure?
programme.desc: Imagine arriving in a new country and having an AI guide, translator, and trip planner in your pocket. That future is already here! We'll show you useful travel apps, explain what AI can already do and show you robotics innovations happening in the travel industry. But: as travel becomes easier than ever, are we losing what made it meaningful in the first place?

programme.title: Peru - Life At 4,000 Meters
programme.desc: The Peruvian Altiplano is one of the most extreme habitats in the world. Located over 4,000 meters above sea level, the region attracts millions of visitors - and pushes many of them to their physical limits.

programme.title: Cuba On The Brink: The End Of A Revolution?

programme.title: How Ukraine Turned Drones Into An Economic Weapon
programme.desc: Ukraine's war effort is increasingly being shaped by drones, software and a fast-moving defense tech industry built under fire. Nataliia Shapoval from Kyiv School of Economics and Iryna Zabolotna from Brave1 explain how Ukraine is striking deeper into Russia, pressuring oil infrastructure and trying to offset Russia's bigger military machine.

programme.title: How X-Ray Imaging Is Driving A Crash Test Revolution
programme.desc: High-speed X-rays let researchers see exactly what happens during a collision. Also on the show: plastic-eating worms, a sailboat for ocean research, and why women in soccer run farther and play harder than men.

programme.title: History Goes Interactive: Learning Through Tech
programme.desc: Digital technology unlocks new ways to explore history through VR, AR and games - but social media can oversimplify or distort facts.

programme.title: Inside Afrobeats Culture: Berlin Carnival, Cape Town Dance & Music Hustle
programme.desc: In this week's show, we are at the carnival of cultures in Berlin. And from Berlin to Cape Town to Lagos, we look at how dance and music are connecting cultures across the world.

programme.title: Racing After A Heart Transplant
programme.desc: After suffering two sudden cardiac deaths and a number of severe health complications, 32-year-old Tamara Schwab's life was saved by a heart transplant. She's now vowed not to waste a single minute of her second stint at life and is pushing herself to the limit to compete in the World Transplant Games. But can her body take it?

programme.title: How X-Ray Imaging Is Driving A Crash Test Revolution
programme.desc: High-speed X-rays let researchers see exactly what happens during a collision. Also on the show: plastic-eating worms, a sailboat for ocean research, and why women in soccer run farther and play harder than men.

programme.title: From Trash To Treasure
programme.desc: Reduce, reuse and recycle - to live a waste free life is the goal of more and more people around the world. But where to start? HER introduces women with creative and innovative ideas on how to consume less and recycle more. And sometimes it's also, about showing that even waste can be turned into something wonderful.

programme.title: Peru - Life At 4,000 Meters
programme.desc: The Peruvian Altiplano is one of the most extreme habitats in the world. Located over 4,000 meters above sea level, the region attracts millions of visitors - and pushes many of them to their physical limits.

programme.title: Racing After A Heart Transplant
programme.desc: After suffering two sudden cardiac deaths and a number of severe health complications, 32-year-old Tamara Schwab's life was saved by a heart transplant. She's now vowed not to waste a single minute of her second stint at life and is pushing herself to the limit to compete in the World Transplant Games. But can her body take it?

programme.title: How X-Ray Imaging Is Driving A Crash Test Revolution
programme.desc: High-speed X-rays let researchers see exactly what happens during a collision. Also on the show: plastic-eating worms, a sailboat for ocean research, and why women in soccer run farther and play harder than men.

programme.title: From Trash To Treasure
programme.desc: Reduce, reuse and recycle - to live a waste free life is the goal of more and more people around the world. But where to start? HER introduces women with creative and innovative ideas on how to consume less and recycle more. And sometimes it's also, about showing that even waste can be turned into something wonderful.

programme.title: The Future Of Travel: Apps, Ai, Robots - And The Loss Of Adventure?
programme.desc: Imagine arriving in a new country and having an AI guide, translator, and trip planner in your pocket. That future is already here! We'll show you useful travel apps, explain what AI can already do and show you robotics innovations happening in the travel industry. But: as travel becomes easier than ever, are we losing what made it meaningful in the first place?

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: E50
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E529
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! A vivid, real-life adaptation story of foreigners trying to settle into Korean society for various reasons. programme.title: E33
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E1 - Anthony Joshua
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls teaches the unified world heavyweight champion some alternative survival skills.

programme.title: E4 - Green Iguanas
programme.desc: A once sought-after pet, the green iguanas escaped their terrariums in the 60's and found the Florida eco-system to be a much more hospitable environment to call home. Free to roam the canals, parks, and suburban neighborhoods, these pets-gone-feral have exploded in both size and population, causing hundreds of millions of dollars of damage a year in Florida. Urban hunter Michael Onega is doing his part to clean up the environment by removing as many iguanas as possible, limiting their population spread. The singular goal - to make sure the iguanas never establish a healthy breeding population in the Everglades. Yia joins Michael and his trusty Labrador Scout on Michael's mud boat, as they patrol the canals in Michael's backyard. The only thing better than Scout retrieving the fallen iguanas, are BBQed iguana and iguana tacos cooked up in Michael's backyard.

programme.title: E6 - Lima
programme.desc: Lima is known as the Garden City, but driving here definitely isn't a walk in the park.

programme.title: E10 - Vietnam
programme.desc: Off to Vietnam next, Rooftop and Catfish embark on what may be their most dangerous visit yet. The BMX bikers start their journey relatively tame with a shot of snake blood. However, things quickly escalate from there with the most intense game of frogger they’ve ever played in the Vietnamese streets. From a hospital visit and racing through the Vietcong tunnels to trying fertilized baby bird eggs and relaxing in a boiling hot spring, nothing can prepare the duo for the ending of their trip heading to the demilitarized zone to detonate bombs. After this trip to Vietnam, what more heart-racing adventures and Rooftop and Catfish possibly find?

programme.title: E12 - Reindeer Rodeo
programme.desc: Billy and Bea help a young animal-lover who allowed a pair of reindeer to escape from a petting zoo. Then Billy goes swimming to catch a predator that's eating ducks in a rural homeowner's pond.

programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day's agenda. Airing CNBC's award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day's agenda. Airing CNBC's award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America's post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. programme.desc: Cody battles the dangers of dehydration searching for water and fire-making tools, while Joe gears up for mortal combat with aggressive feral boars.

programme.title: E6 - The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: As small-town secrets unravel, Sheriff Mike Gormley uncovers a dangerous love triangle and a vengeful killer who is willing to risk his own blood for retribution.

programme.title: E2 - Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: In New Mexico, police chase a shooter who guns down an unarmed man. In Florida, police close in on an armed robber from the ground and air.

programme.title: E11 - Cold Hard Crashout
programme.desc: A seven-acre, snow-covered hoard pushes Matt to the brink. To clear the stairs, they toss 500 pounds of trash and hunt for lost gold on the top floor.

programme.title: E1 - Miners Vs Miners
programme.desc: Tensions erupt among the crews as miners battle to bring in big gold. From fistfights to meltdowns, these are the loudest moments when they clashed.

programme.title: E12 - On Shaky Ground
programme.desc: Parker fights to stop his gold slide, Rick makes a discovery that could end his Vegas Valley dreams, and Kevin scores big at Sphinx Cut.

programme.title: E10 - Secrets Of Vulture City
programme.desc: Joined by Jack Osbourne, Heather investigates the eerie ghost town of Vulture City, where Gold Rush-era spirits hint at a far older evil.

programme.title: E1170
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Music Box: Yacht Rock: A Dockumentary
programme.desc: This groove-infused documentary explores how a breezy music subgenre became cool decades later – and will get you dancing.

programme.title: Jersey Girl
programme.desc: When a successful publicist finds himself an unemployed single father back living with his dad in the suburbs, he learns to acknowledge what truly makes him happy.

programme.title: E5 - This Little Piggy
programme.desc: She would never say it out loud, but Nate going broke finally granted Cassie permission to follow her dreams.

programme.title: E6 - Stand Still And See
programme.desc: Maybe every mistake Rue made led her to the right place after all.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E6 - 畫風不同的兩個爸爸討論帶娃經驗
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E6 - 畫風不同的兩個爸爸討論帶娃經驗

programme.title: The Secrets We Keep
programme.desc: In post-war America, a suburban housewife goes to extreme lengths to expose her neighbour as a Nazi war criminal.

programme.title: The Secrets We Keep
programme.desc: In post-war America, a suburban housewife goes to extreme lengths to expose her neighbour as a Nazi war criminal.

programme.title: Ben Is Back
programme.desc: When her errant son returns home unexpectedly one Christmas Eve, a doting mother realises her family is in harm's way.

programme.title: Mount CHIAK
programme.desc: Members of 'GO2MOUNTAIN' bike riding club try valleys of Mount CHIAK where unreal too-cleanly-cut mutilation murders happened. Moments of freedom riding the mountain, odd things happen around them. Will they survive through what that haunts?

programme.title: Handsome Guys
programme.desc: 'Do we lacking anything? We have a house, a truck, and very attractive.' Self-proclaimed tough guy Jae-pil and sexy guy Sang-gu leave an unforgettable first impression on their moving day. Despite becoming special surveillance targets for Police Chief Choi and Officer Nam, they are simply happy to start anew in their European-style dream house. However, happiness is short-lived as they are inadvertently mistaken for kidnappers while trying to rescue Mina, who almost drowns. Meanwhile, uninvited guests looking for Mina start appearing, and an ancient spirit sealed in the basement awakens, surrounding the house with dark energy.

programme.title: Crayon Shinchan: Serious Battle! Robot Dad Strikes Back
programme.desc: A high tech company which specialises in making robots for construction turns Hiroshi nohara in a robot who then along with shinosuke fights to reclaim his original body fighting other robots.

programme.title: CRISIS NEGOTIATORS
programme.desc: Negotiator expert Cheuk Man Wai unexpectedly becomes the prime suspect in a murder case. Forced into a corner, he occupies the police station, taking officers hostage, and demands negotiations with the former negotiator Tse Ka Chun. With Tse's expertise in psychological manipulation and Cheuk's exceptional skills, they engage in a battle of wits. As the verbal sparring deepens, their positions and mindsets gradually change...This film is adapted from the American movie 'The Negotiator'.

programme.desc: RAW agent Sehmat marries into a Pakistani family to spy for India, risking her life, emotions, and marriage while secretly protecting her nation. programme.title: Dreams Of Glory, A Boxer's Story.
programme.desc: Silent classmate Ming, an ambitious boxing addict, decides to learn boxing in Thailand after a technical knockdown in a contest which he was confident of winning. By witnessing the rigorous training on the spot, he not only develops the physique of a boxer but enhances the dignity and dauntless spirit of the boxer in a tournament. Tak is another young upcoming boxer. He learned Chinese martial arts from his father since childhood. Not wanting to be cooped up in the narrow confines of boxing only, he undergoes hard training in Thai boxing in a gym, hoping to widen the boxing horizon...

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Tubig To Handle Sun
programme.desc: Get ready to get soaked! 💦 Experience the wettest, wildest, and wackiest game show in the Philippines - Tubig To Handle!. Watch as fearless contestants dive headfirst into epic water obstacle challenges, face hilarious wipeouts, and battle it out for BIG prizes. From slippery slides to heart-pumping showdowns, every episode is packed with non-stop action, laughter, and pure Pinoy fun. Hosted by Yassi Pressman and your favorite stars, this splash-filled adventure is guaranteed to bring nonstop laughter, thrills, and all-out water fun like never before!

programme.title: Astig Vegan S3
programme.desc: A cooking show hosted by RG Enriquez-Diez, showcasing plant-based recipes inspired by Filipino cuisine and beloved Filipino dishes.

programme.title: Ano Na, Bev S6
programme.desc: Best Expressed Views

programme.title: Kapamilya Daily Mass[Live]
programme.desc: A daily celebration of the Liturgy of the Lord with Fr. Tito Caluag. Join us as we reflect on the goodness of God in this healing mass.

programme.title: Darna
programme.desc: Narda, a typical schoolgirl, learns that her mother is the protector of a mighty stone. She takes up the mantle and transforms into Darna, a superhero dedicated to battling evil forces on Earth.

programme.title: Home Away From Home S5
programme.desc: a travel & lifestyle show that celebrates Filipino stories abroad as it chronicles Filipino communities all over the world and explores cultural exchanges of Pinoys in their home away from home.

programme.title: Next In Line: Young Pinoy Athletes On The Rise[Live]
programme.desc: The documentary follows the journey of the next generation of Filipino athletes who are all trying to make a name from themselves in their respective sports. Journalist Paige Javier introduces five young Filipino athletes and their dreams of competing on the world stage; gymnasts Eldrew Yulo and Tchelzy Maayo, tennis player Maristella Torrecampo, and pole vaulters JV Pacheco and Marvi Marcelo.

programme.title: It's Showtime (Sat)[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: E26 - Pesto 2.0
programme.desc: Rachael is known for her delicious and flavourful pesto sauces of all varieties. She prepares a pesto alla trapanese, a Sicilian dish made with almonds and tomatoes.

programme.title: E16 - Hoisin Sloppy Janes On Bao Buns
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece kicks off this incredible meal with crispy purple yam jojos, inspired by the Pacific Northwest. Coated in oil and a seasoned flour mixture, they're baked to perfection.

programme.title: E16 - Lamb Chops With Rice & Spinach
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a well-rounded meal of a French-cut rack of lamb, baked with Dijon mustard and seasoned breadcrumbs, and a side dish of brown and wild rice with porcini mushrooms and sauteed spinach.

programme.desc: They meet the finest biker of Jiri Mountain, a poet who fled city life to live in the mountains. From this poet, who captures photos of stars and flowers, the two actors learn poetry.
